store_headline: One-Page WPBakery Music Theme for Bands and Artists
store_subheadline: One scrollable page for your music, tour dates, discography, merch, and fan links — built in.
features: One-page layout for music artists and bands
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value) included
Wolf Visual Composer extension with custom music elements
Integrated music player for showcasing tracks
Event listing and tour date functionality
Video gallery with custom player options
Content Blocks system for custom sections
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Social media integration for building fan base
selling_points: The definitive one-page WPBakery music theme — music, dates, discography, merch, and fan links in one scroll
Built for the large WPBakery user base who want a complete music site
Simpler and more accessible than Notescape — classic WPBakery music presence without dramatic visual overload
Multiple genre-specific demos — Rock, Minimal, and more — so your starting point already fits your sound
Integrated audio player and playlist manager so fans can listen without leaving the page
WooCommerce merch store included — fans can buy from the same scroll they found your music
WPBakery drag-and-drop means you rearrange every section without touching code or hiring a developer
One-click demo import gets a complete one-page music site live in minutes
key_benefits: Launch a complete artist site on a single WPBakery-powered page
Keep fans scrolling from first listen to merch checkout on one page
Present discography, tour schedule, and merchandise without forcing fans through multiple pages
Sell merch and music from the same page fans discover your sound
Build a professional one-page presence with WPBakery's familiar drag-and-drop tools
Convert passive visitors into fans by placing every touchpoint on one scroll

testimonials.text: The overall look and usability of this theme is great, but the documentation and custoemr support is what sets it apart. Really helpful ressources and great supprt!
testimonials.author: joergrappl

testimonials.text: This was possibly the best theme I have ever purchased. The amount of features and the quality, control and ability to customize is amazing AND the support is excellent! WolfThemes, I'm a fan!
testimonials.author: ricalien

testimonials.text: Very good and fast customer support for a very good looking theme! Works great for us, keep on the good work.
testimonials.author: RoofMusic
